title: rutidea gracilis subsp. gracilis
intro: Rutidea gracilis subsp. gracilis, also known as the slender rutidea, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rutidea gracilis subsp. gracilis include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health concerns.
